sections.paragraph:
ϰτίσμα, ατος, τό [κτίζω] ‘created entity’, in NT always as product of divine activity

—a. in gener., without restriction creation, animate and inanimate Js 1:18.

—b. of animate entities creature, in heaven Rv 5:13; in the sea 8:9.

—c. created thing, in cultic context 1 Ti 4:4.
